sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n74966" key="o)rqologe/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀρθο-λογέω</orth>, <sense id="n74966.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">speak correctly,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.570e</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
